option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="#E8FDF0" /> <corners android:topLeftRadius="0dp" android:topRightRadius="0dp" android:bottomLeftRadius="14dp" android:bottomRightRadius="0dp" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="#E8FDF0" /> <corners android:topLeftRadius="0dp" android:topRightRadius="0dp" android:bottomLeftRadius="0dp" android:bottomRightRadius="14dp" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="#E8FDF0" /> <corners android:topLeftRadius="14dp" android:topRightRadius="0dp" android:bottomLeftRadius="0dp" android:bottomRightRadius="0dp" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="#E8FDF0" /> <corners android:topLeftRadius="0dp" android:topRightRadius="14dp" android:bottomLeftRadius="0dp" android:bottomRightRadius="0dp" /> </shape>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/drawer_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".DashBoard">
<!-- Main content --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<include android:id="@+id/toolbarSection" layout="@layout/dashboard_toolbar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<include android:id="@+id/profileInfo" layout="@layout/profile_info" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/toolbarSection" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Dashboard Activity" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/profileInfo" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<!-- Drawer --> <include layout="@layout/drawer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="start" />
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/drawer_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".DashBoard">
<!-- Main content --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<include android:id="@+id/toolbarSection" layout="@layout/dashboard_toolbar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<include android:id="@+id/profileInfo" layout="@layout/profile_info" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/toolbarSection" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<include android:id="@+id/dashboardMenu" layout="@layout/dashboard_menu" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/profileInfo" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Dashboard Activity" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/dashboardMenu" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<!-- Drawer --> <include layout="@layout/drawer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="start" />
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp">
<!-- Vertical guideline at center to split left and right columns evenly --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/guidelineMid" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.5" />
<!-- ═══ ORDER (top-left) — top-LEFT corner rounded ═══ --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/cardOrder" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="130dp" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_card_tl" android:clickable="true" android:elevation="2dp" android:focusable="true" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/guidelineMid" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:contentDescription="@string/order_icon_desc" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_send" app:tint="#2E7D32" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/menu_order" android:textColor="#2E7D32" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout> </FrameLayout>
<!-- ═══ PRE ORDER (top-right, staggered 65dp down) — top-RIGHT corner rounded ═══ --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/cardPreOrder" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="130dp" android:layout_marginStart="3dp" android:layout_marginTop="65dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_card_tr" android:clickable="true" android:elevation="2dp" android:focusable="true" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@+id/guidelineMid" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:contentDescription="@string/preorder_icon_desc" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_recent_history" app:tint="#2E7D32" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/menu_pre_order" android:textColor="#2E7D32" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout> </FrameLayout>
<!-- ═══ COLLECTION (bottom-left) — bottom-LEFT corner rounded ═══ --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/cardCollection" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="130dp" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:layout_marginEnd="3dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_card_bl" android:clickable="true" android:elevation="2dp" android:focusable="true" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@+id/guidelineMid" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/cardOrder">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:contentDescription="@string/collection_icon_desc" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_save" app:tint="#2E7D32" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/menu_collection" android:textColor="#2E7D32" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout> </FrameLayout>
<!-- ═══ SALES RETURN (bottom-right) — bottom-RIGHT corner rounded ═══ --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/cardSalesReturn" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="130dp" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:layout_marginStart="3dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_card_br" android:clickable="true" android:elevation="2dp" android:focusable="true" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@+id/guidelineMid" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/cardPreOrder">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:contentDescription="@string/salesreturn_icon_desc" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_revert" app:tint="#2E7D32" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/menu_sales_return" android:textColor="#2E7D32" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout> </FrameLayout>
<!-- Anchor spacer: forces ConstraintLayout wrap_content height to include cardSalesReturn bottom --> <Space android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/cardSalesReturn" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Bulkcor 2.0</string> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome To</string> <string name="login_company_name">Bulkcor Trading LLC</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Login to your account</string> <string name="login_hint_username">Username</string> <string name="login_hint_password">Password</string> <string name="login_forgot_password">Forgot password?</string> <string name="login_sign_in">Sign In</string> <string name="dashboard_menu_icon_desc">Dashboard menu icon</string> <string name="dashboard_exit_desc">Exit dashboard</string> <string name="profile_name">Apps Admin</string> <string name="profile_date">May 16, 2026 \u2022 10:47 AM</string> <string name="profile_image_desc">Profile image</string> <string name="home_desc">Home icon</string> <string name="customer_list_desc">Customer list icon</string> <string name="order_placement_desc">Order placement icon</string> <string name="password_change_desc">Password change icon</string> <string name="logout_desc">Logout icon</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Bulkcor 2.0</string> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome To</string> <string name="login_company_name">Bulkcor Trading LLC</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Login to your account</string> <string name="login_hint_username">Username</string> <string name="login_hint_password">Password</string> <string name="login_forgot_password">Forgot password?</string> <string name="login_sign_in">Sign In</string> <string name="dashboard_menu_icon_desc">Dashboard menu icon</string> <string name="dashboard_exit_desc">Exit dashboard</string> <string name="profile_name">Apps Admin</string> <string name="profile_date">May 16, 2026 \u2022 10:47 AM</string> <string name="profile_image_desc">Profile image</string> <string name="home_desc">Home icon</string> <string name="customer_list_desc">Customer list icon</string> <string name="order_placement_desc">Order placement icon</string> <string name="password_change_desc">Password change icon</string> <string name="logout_desc">Logout icon</string> <string name="menu_order">Order</string> <string name="menu_pre_order">Pre Order</string> <string name="menu_collection">Collection</string> <string name="menu_sales_return">Sales Return</string> <string name="order_icon_desc">Order icon</string> <string name="preorder_icon_desc">Pre Order icon</string> <string name="collection_icon_desc">Collection icon</string> <string name="salesreturn_icon_desc">Sales Return icon</string> </resources>
